name: 法玛斯 | 退役
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. This custom paint job is inspired by elements found on de_nuke from Counter-Strike 1.6. If found please return to Cedar Creek Nuclear Power Plant
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器的自定义涂装的灵感来自于反恐精英1.6时期的核子危机地图上的元素。 如果你想要找到原型，回雪松溪核电站来走走吧！
